answer:
So, one thing I used to do regularly was journaling. I mean, I was really into it for a while. I’d sit down every evening, pen in hand, and just pour my heart out on the pages. It felt like a great way to unwind after a long day, you know? I’d write about everything—the good stuff, the bad stuff, all of it. But then, life got so busy, and I found myself skipping days, then weeks. 

Honestly, I think I got caught up in a whirlwind of work and social commitments. It’s funny how you can start something that feels super important and then just... let it fade away. I tried to get back into it a few times, but it never quite stuck. Sometimes, I really miss that routine because it helped me reflect on my thoughts and feelings. Now, instead of journaling, I find myself just scrolling through my phone, which, let’s be honest, isn’t the same at all. So, yeah, it’s kind of bittersweet looking back on it, but I guess that's just how life goes sometimes, right?
title: What's something you stopped doing that you once did regularly?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20250327/9fbb7f4188af4ea1875ec865f682a266.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：  
“Reflecting on personal habits, there are several activities that I used to engage in regularly but have since stopped. One significant example is [activity].”

正文：  
关于停止的原因：  
“I decided to stop this activity because [reason, such as lack of time, changed interests, or negative impact on well-being].”

关于过去的参与情况：  
“There was a time when I would [describe how often you did the activity or how it was a part of your routine], and it brought me [mention any benefits or enjoyment derived from it].”

关于当前的情况：  
“Now, instead of doing that, I focus more on [new activity or interest], which has allowed me to [mention any improvements or benefits related to the new activity].”

结论：  
总结你的观点：  
“In conclusion, while I used to enjoy [activity], I have found that [new activity] better aligns with my current lifestyle and priorities.”  
最后的想法：  
“It's important to adapt our habits as we grow and evolve.”","titleTranslate":"有什么事情是你曾经经常做但现在不再做的？"}
